goal_text: Task 00081: You are looking for an expensive restaurant and it should be in the south part of town. Don't go for the first venue the system offers you, ask if there is anything else. Make sure you get the address, phone number, and postcode.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
